title: Davik Kang's estate

'''Davik Kang's estate''' was [[Davik Kang]]'s home and main base of [[Exchange]] operations on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. It had many rooms and areas. The guest lounge had a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] chamber where guests could get a free massage. There was an armory and [[Torture/Legends|torture]] chamber which Kang used to interrogate undesirable individuals such as [[Hudrow]]. The estate also had many security guards patrolling nearly every centimeter of the estate. Davik's top two men, the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Canderous Ordo]] and the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Calo Nord]], both had rooms at his estate. Nord's quarters contained many stuffed creature heads, including a young [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]]. A gigantic hangar housed Kang's most prized possession, the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''.<ref name="KOTOR" />

When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] crash-landed on Taris with [[Carth Onasi]], Ordo decided to steal the ''Ebon Hawk'' with Revan and escape the planet. To do so, they infiltrated Davik's estate, explaining that Revan was looking for a job in the Exchange. After Kang and Nord left, they explored the estate and, after raiding most of Kang's possessions and killing most of the guards, reached the hangar as [[Darth Malak]] and the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Destruction of Taris|bombed the planet]]. Davik and Calo entered the hangar as well and a skirmish ensured. Malak's shots damaged the estate and Davik was killed. Calo was thought to be dead, but actually escaped the bombardment of the planet.<ref name="KOTOR" />
